task_description: Perform 5 rounds of critical analysis and fixes on the Self-Evolving AI Development Kernel. Each round addresses a specific architectural weakness: Round 1 adds real AI execution to runner, Round 2 adds intelligent skill composition, Round 3 adds stuck/retry detection, Round 4 adds evolution intelligence, Round 5 adds boot resilience and validation. Plus a review-fix round addressing code quality issues.

verification.summary: 279 tests pass (up from 183 baseline), 99% coverage (3466 statements, 33 missed). All 5 rounds implemented plus review fixes for shlex parsing, fallback logging, resume reset, and returncode handling.
